Molecular Biology and Genetics Departmental Seminar Series #9: Kerwyn Casey Huang

We held the last seminar of the semester. We would like to thank our guest speaker Kerwyn Casy Huang for his great presentation and his time! A great pleasure for all of us to listen to his current research outcomes!
